info.name: Factset Starts a New Script Calculation

items.docs: This endpoint takes a python script and starts executing it within FPE

info.name: Factset Get Calculation Status by Id

params.name: id
params.description: From url, provided by location header or response body in the calculation start endpoint

items.docs: This is the endpoint to check on the progress of a previous calculation request.

info.name: Factset Get Calculation Output for a Specific Calculation

params.name: id
params.description: From url, provided by location header or response body in the calculation start endpoint

items.docs: This endpoint returns the specified output from the calculation.

info.name: Factset Get Calculation Log for a Specific Calculation

params.name: id
params.description: From url, provided by location header or response body in the calculation start endpoint

items.docs: This endpoint returns the log from the calculation.

params.name: server
params.description: The server to upload the file to. Either `interactive` or `batch`.

params.name: file
params.description: The file name to upload the file to. Existing directory can be specified.

items.docs: This endpoint takes a file and uploads it

info.name: Factset Get Upload Status by Id

params.name: id
params.description: From url, provided by location header or response body in the upload start endpoint

items.docs: This is the endpoint to check on the progress of a previous upload request.
